tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: It is time you _________ (take) your studies more seriously; otherwise, you _________ (regret) it later.
The documentary, _________ (direct) by an award-winning filmmaker, _________ (watch) by over a million people since its release.
I would rather you _________ (not / tell) anyone about this until we _________ (know) all the facts.
Despite _________ (prepare) thoroughly for the interview, she felt nervous and found it difficult _________ (express) her ideas clearly.
He _________ (must / leave) his keys at school because he _________ (can / not / open) the front door when he got home.
If the project _________ (submit) by Friday, the team _________ (consider) for the regional innovation award.
